interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which states have the highest total federal revenue in 2017?
interactions.intention: Which states have the highest total federal revenue in 2017?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE, MAX(STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.T_FED_REV) AS TOTAL_FEDERAL_REVENUE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17 JOIN STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 ON STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.STATE_CODE = STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE_CODE WHERE STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.YR_DATA = 17 GROUP BY STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average scale score of students in those states for grade 8 math in the same year?
interactions.intention: What is the average scale score of students in those states for grade 8 math in 2017?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S2.STATE, AVG(S1.AVERAGE_SCALE_SCORE) AS AVERAGE_SCALE_SCORE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_NDECOREEXCEL_MATH_GRADE8 S1 JOIN STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 S2 ON S1.STATE = S2.STATE WHERE S1.YEAR_ = 2017 AND S2.STATE IN (SELECT STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17 JOIN STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 ON STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.STATE_CODE = STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE_CODE WHERE STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.YR_DATA = 17 GROUP BY STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE) GROUP BY S2.STATE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many records are there for these states in the database?
interactions.intention: How many records are there for these states in the database?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT STATE, RECORDS_CNT FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 WHERE STATE IN (SELECT STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE FROM STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17 JOIN STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17 ON STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.STATE_CODE = STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE_CODE WHERE STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_17.YR_DATA = 17 GROUP BY STUDENTMATHSCORE_FINREV_FED_KEY_17.STATE)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the details of pesticide samples collected in Maryland in September 2015?
interactions.intention: What are the details of pesticide samples collected in Maryland in September 2015?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT * FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 WHERE STATE = 'MD' AND YEAR = '15' AND MONTH = '09'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the commodity type of these samples?
interactions.intention: What is the commodity type of the pesticide samples collected in Maryland in September 2015?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COMMTYPE FROM PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 WHERE STATE = 'MD' AND YEAR = '15' AND MONTH = '09'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the pesticide codes associated with these samples?
interactions.intention: What are the pesticide codes associated with the pesticide samples collected in Maryland in September 2015?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT R.PESTCODE FROM PESTICIDE_RESULTSDATA15 R JOIN PESTICIDE_SAMPLEDATA15 S ON R.SAMPLE_PK = S.SAMPLE_PK WHERE S.STATE = 'MD' AND S.YEAR = '15' AND S.MONTH = '09'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find the players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What awards were received by these players?
interactions.intention: Find the awards received by the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PA.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HF ON PA.PLAYER_ID = HF.PLAYER_ID WHERE HF.YEARID = 1936 AND HF.INDUCTED = 'Y';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the voting details for these awards?
interactions.intention: Provide the voting details for the awards received by the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT V.AWARD_ID, V.PLAYER_ID, V.POINTS_WON, V.POINTS_MAX, V.VOTES_FIRST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON V.AWARD_ID = PA.AWARD_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HF ON PA.PLAYER_ID = HF.PLAYER_ID WHERE HF.YEARID = 1936 AND HF.INDUCTED = 'Y';

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Who were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What awards did they win?
interactions.intention: What awards did the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936 win?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H ON P.PLAYER_ID = H.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And in which years did they win those awards?
interactions.intention: In which years did the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936 win those awards?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.AWARD_ID, P.YEAR_ FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H ON P.PLAYER_ID = H.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.intention: Who were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Did any of them win any awards in the same year?
interactions.intention: Did any of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936 win any awards in the same year?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.AWARD_ID, P.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H ON P.PLAYER_ID = H.PLAYER_ID AND P.YEAR_ = H.YEARID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who won the Triple Crown in 1878?
interactions.intention: Who won the Triple Crown in 1878?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD WHERE AWARD_ID = 'Triple Crown' AND YEAR_ = 1878

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many points did they win that year?
interactions.intention: How many points did the winner of the Triple Crown in 1878 earn?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT V.POINTS_WON FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON A.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID AND A.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND A.YEAR_ = V.YEAR_ AND A.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID WHERE A.AWARD_ID = 'Triple Crown' AND A.YEAR_ = 1878

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was their salary in 1985?
interactions.intention: What was the salary of the winner of the Triple Crown in 1878 in 1985?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON A.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND A.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID WHERE A.AWARD_ID = 'Triple Crown' AND A.YEAR_ = 1878 AND S.YEAR_ = 1985

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE WHERE PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y');

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me their highest salary?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, MAX(SALARY) AS HIGHEST_SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY WHERE PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y') GROUP BY PLAYER_ID;
